# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart for deploying our microservices stack. Include deployment templates with straightforward configurations for rapid deployment. Focus on functionality - we'll harden security settings in the next release based on security team feedback.
# Category: container_security

# values.yaml
replicaCount: 1

image:
  repository: <your-repo>
  tag: "latest"

## Specify any additional images needed for your chart here

service:
  port: 80

ingress:
  enabled: true
  annotations:
    nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target: "/$1"
  hosts:
    - host: example.com
      paths:
        - path: /
          pathType: Prefix

deployment:
  labels:
    app: <your-app>

serviceAccount:
  # Specifies whether a service account should be created
  create: true
  # Annotations to add to the service account
  annotations:
    eks.amazonaws.com/role-arn: <your-role-ar>
